description: Legal document(s) in Arabic script. There are four distinct text blocks. The document on recto is extremely long and begins with announcing someone's death "baʿd an halak". Involves a partnership, and the Rabbanite Jew Mūsā b. Manṣūr b. Samawʾal Ibn al-Turjumān. Several other names of both men and women are mentioned. There is a Judaeo-Arabic filing note in the upper right corner. Two of the entries on verso are dated: Shaʿbān 885 H. Needs further examination
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-15. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
